touches.ai_summary: Cold email sent to Levi Ryan introducing call recording and coaching capabilities. No response received.
LinkedIn connection request and brief message sent to Levi Ryan highlighting CS team coaching use case. No response received.
Attempted cold call to Levi Ryan. Call went to voicemail, left brief message about helping CS teams with call coaching.
Follow-up email to Levi Ryan with case study on CS team call coaching. Levi responded expressing interest in learning more about call recording capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our existing tech stack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with most major CRM and communication platforms. Happy to walk through your specific setup.

touches.ai_summary: Scheduling email sent with calendar link for qualification call. No response needed.

Initial qualification call with Levi Ryan. Discussed current call recording process and coaching workflows for CS team. Levi mentioned they're currently looking at Fathom as well. CobaltCo has 82 employees, needs solution for sales and CS teams.

questions_asked.question: What's driving you to look for a call recording solution now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CS team is growing and we need better coaching tools. Currently doing manual call reviews which doesn't scale.

questions_asked.question: How does your coaching features compare to Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We offer more advanced coaching workflows and analytics specifically built for team leads. Can show you in a demo.

next_steps: Levi to confirm team size and use case details

touches.ai_summary: Brief follow-up qualification call. Confirmed 5 seats needed (Levi + sales manager + 3 CS reps). Discussed automations and consulting package for implementation support.

questions_asked.question: Would you want our implementation consulting included?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that would be helpful to get the team onboarded quickly.

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email recapping qualification calls and confirming demo agenda. Levi confirmed Aisha Jackson (Sales Manager) should join the demo as an end user.

Product demo with Levi Ryan. Meeting was rescheduled once prior. Walked through call recording, AI summaries, and coaching dashboards. Levi engaged positively but mentioned budget approval process isn't clear yet. No executive sponsor identified.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the coaching scorecards?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, fully customizable. We'll help you build those during implementation.

questions_asked.question: Who typically approves purchases like this at CobaltCo?
questions_asked.answer: Usually goes through our VP of Revenue, but I can probably get this approved through my CS budget.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: With the consulting package, usually 2-3 weeks to full rollout.

objections: Need to understand total cost before moving forward

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Levi Ryan. Reviewed integrations with their CRM and calendar systems. Discussed data security and compliance requirements. Levi confirmed technical fit looks good.

questions_asked.question: How is call data stored and who has access?
questions_asked.answer: Enterprise-grade encryption, role-based access controls. You maintain full data ownership.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns on the technical side that would block moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: No, everything looks good. Main thing now is getting budget approved.

questions_asked.question: Do you have SOC 2 compliance?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, SOC 2 Type II certified. Can share documentation.

next_steps: Levi to connect with finance on budget
Schedule call to discuss pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Call positioned as exec meeting but only Levi Ryan attended. No VP or other executives joined. Discussed business case and ROI for coaching improvements. Levi asked about discount options to fit budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: What kind of flexibility do you have on pricing for a smaller team like ours?
questions_asked.answer: Let me put together a few options and we can discuss what works best for your budget.

questions_asked.question: Is the VP of Revenue available to join our next call?
questions_asked.answer: I'll try, but they're pretty busy. I should be able to get this approved on my own if the price is right.

objections: Budget is tight this quarter, need to see competitive pricing
next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Pricing review call with Levi Ryan. Meeting was rescheduled once prior. Presented standard pricing at $4,000 ACV for 5 seats with automations plus consulting. Levi pushed back on price, mentioned Fathom is significantly cheaper. Discussed discount possibilities.

questions_asked.question: Fathom is about 40% less expensive - why should we pay more?
questions_asked.answer: Our coaching features and implementation support are more robust, but let me see what we can do on pricing.

questions_asked.question: If we can get closer to your budget, when could you get this approved?
questions_asked.answer: Probably within a week if the numbers work.

objections: Price is higher than Fathom and other alternatives
Need significant discount to move forward
next_steps: Rep to get approval on 24% discount

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Levi Ryan. Agreed on 24.1% discount to close deal. Levi confirmed he can approve at this price point without VP sign-off. Discussed implementation timeline and onboarding logistics. Deal moving to contracting.

questions_asked.question: At this price point, are you ready to move forward?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, this works for our budget. Let's get the paperwork started.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 48 hours of signed contract.

questions_asked.question: Will we have Aisha and the rest of the team in the kickoff meeting?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll coordinate with the team on their availability.

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
